name: Chocolate Pots De Creme & 1 Variation
recipeIngredient: 1 cup half and half or light cream
1 package sweet baking chocolate, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small heavy saucepan combine the half-and-half or cream, chocolate, and sugar.
2. Cook and stir over medium heat, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes or until the mixture reaches a full boil and thickens.
3. Gradually stir about half of the hot mixture into the beaten egg yolks.
4. Stir the egg yolk mixture into the remaining hot mixture in the saucepan.
5. Cook and stir over low heat for 2 more minutes, then remove from heat.
6. Stir in the vanilla.
7. Pour the warm chocolate mixture into 4 or 6 pots de creme cups or small bowls.
8. Cover and chill for 2 to 24 hours.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
Variation: Espresso Chocolate Pots De Creme
Prepare as above, except add 2 teaspoons instant espresso powder along with the cream.
